Name: Average time for Completed + Resolved when preceded by Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time for Completed + Resolved when not preceded by Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Resolved' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call does not occur

Name: Total time from Completed + In Call to Completed + Resolved across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + In Call and activity Completed + Resolved for cases where activity Completed + Resolved occurs

Name: Minimum time between Completed + In Call and Completed + Resolved in variants where they occur consecutively
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average cycle time of Completed + Resolved in variants that include Completed + In Call versus variants that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Resolved' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time elapsed from the start of the case to Completed + Resolved in traces containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Resolved' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time elapsed from the start of the case to Completed + Resolved in traces not containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Resolved' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call does not occur

Name: Average time for Completed + Resolved grouped by product when the variant includes Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Resolved' and the end of case grouped by the last value of product filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Completed + Resolved grouped by country when the variant includes Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Resolved' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total resolution time of Completed + Resolved in variants starting with Queued + Awaiting Assignment and including Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Total resolution time of Completed + Resolved in variants starting with Accepted + In Progress and including Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time for Completed + Resolved following Accepted + Wait - User in variants that also contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time between Completed + In Call and the next occurrence of Completed + Resolved in multi-occurrence traces
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Time of Completed + Resolved when directly following Completed + In Call compared to when directly following Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Cycle time of Completed + Resolved in the variant \Accepted + In Progress -> Accepted + In Progress -> Completed + In Call -> Accepted + In Progress -> Completed + Resolved -> Completed + Closed\
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Cycle time of Completed + Resolved in the variant \Accepted + In Progress -> Accepted + In Progress -> Completed + In Call\
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time for Completed + Resolved in high-impact cases that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Completed + Resolved and the end of the case

Name: Average time for Completed + Resolved in low-impact cases that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Completed + Resolved and the end of the case

Name: Time from Completed + In Call to Completed + Resolved grouped by resource
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Time from Completed + In Call to Completed + Resolved grouped by organization
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'
